{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Cenilia Arelius
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cenilia Arelius]] is a [[Herald]] of the Arelius clan.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cenilia Arelius]] is a person mentioned by [[Valketh]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
